overview: Buchepalli Venkayamma Subbareddy (BVSR) Engineering College, established in 2008, is a private technical institution situated in Chimakurthy, Prakasam district. Founded with the mission of bringing quality engineering education to rural populations, the college offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in a green, 13-acre campus environment.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted via state-level counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats are under the Convener Quota (Category A) based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit in 10+2 marks.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12 - May 18, 2026; AP PGECET 2026: May 2026; Counselling: June - July 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: The campus is eco-friendly and located on the Ongole-Kurnool road, making it accessible while remaining far enough from city noise to provide a peaceful academic atmosphere. It focuses heavily on 'value-added' certification courses to boost student employability.

contact.address: Ongole - Kurnool Road, Chimakurthy, Prakasam District, Andhra Pradesh - 523226
